features.name: Monorepo Baseline Setup
features.description: Confirm the workspace installs, builds, and type-checks from the repo root using the documented verification path.
features.evidence: Verified from repo root on 2026-06-21 with ./init.sh. Workspace install, backend build, admin build, storefront typecheck, and storefront build all completed successfully.

features.name: Backend API Foundation
features.description: Establish the Hono API structure in apps/backend, including route organization and Cloudflare Worker bindings needed for ecommerce features.
features.evidence: Approved product catalog design documented in docs/plans/2026-06-21-product-backend-design.md and openspec/changes/2026-06-21-product-catalog/.

features.name: Data Layer With Drizzle And D1
features.description: Introduce Drizzle schema, migrations, and Cloudflare D1 bindings only after the backend structure is in place.

features.name: Admin App Router Migration
features.description: Move the admin app from starter content toward a React Router-based internal application shell and first operational screens.
features.evidence: Implemented a protected admin SPA in apps/admin with routes for /login, /orders, and /products; added local auth guard, valibot login validation, Tailwind styling, and searchable mock data tables. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build and ./init.sh on 2026-06-21.

features.name: Storefront Commerce Experience
features.description: Build shopper-facing routes and data flows in the React Router storefront, integrating with the backend API once contracts exist.
